app.name: SplitKaro AI
app.tagline: Split expenses with friends effortlessly using AI.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.connectionError: Failed to reach the server. Please try again.

auth.tagline: Split expenses with friends effortlessly using AI.
auth.googleDescription: Google signs you in. If you're new here, we create your profile after you authorize—no separate signup step.

errors.startFailed: Could not start sign-in. Please try again.
errors.postSignIn: Something went wrong after signing in with Google.
errors.createAccount: Could not create your account. Please try again.
errors.callbackFailed: Sign-in callback failed. Please try again.
errors.emailConflict: This email is already linked to another sign-in method. Use Google for this account.
errors.requiresSignIn: You need to sign in to continue.

about.title: About SplitKaro AI
about.heading: A collaborative expense app built for real shared life
about.description: SplitKaro AI is designed to make shared money management easier for friends, roommates, travel groups, and small teams. It combines clean expense tracking, live updates, and AI-powered input to keep the experience fast and practical.

ai.title: AI-assisted expense capture
ai.description: Natural-language input helps turn casual messages into structured expenses much faster.

realtime.title: Realtime shared updates
realtime.description: Redis-backed events keep dashboards and group pages in sync when people add expenses or settle up.

flexible.title: Flexible payment tracking
flexible.description: The app handles group expenses, individual payments, settlements, and role-based member controls.

dashboard.subtitle: {month} overview
dashboard.recentDescription: Toggle between personal entries and group transactions.

empty.personalDescription: Your latest individual expenses will show here.
empty.groupsDescription: Group expenses and settlements will show here.

groups.title: Groups
groups.owedDescription: People you owe or owe you

empty.title: No groups yet
empty.description: Create a group to start splitting expenses with friends.

activity.title: Activity Feed
activity.emptyDescription: Group expenses and settlements will appear here.

people.title: People Overview
people.allSettledDescription: No pending balances. Invite friends to split expenses together.

errors.connection: Failed to create group. Please check your connection.

activity.emptyDescription: Add friends, then add an expense!

addMemberModal.title: Add Friend
addMemberModal.heading: Add to Group
addMemberModal.description: Select multiple people you already know, or type a fresh email below.
addMemberModal.suggestedDescription: Only people not already in this group
addMemberModal.empty: Everyone you already know is already in this group, or you haven't split with anyone yet.
addMemberModal.emailHint: Type one extra email here if someone isn't in your suggested list yet.

addExpenseModal.title: Add Expense
addExpenseModal.splitInfo: Split will be approximately ₹{amount} per selected person.
addExpenseModal.splitMismatch: Custom split total (₹{totalEntered}) does not match the expense amount (₹{amount}). Please adjust.

settingsModal.title: Group Settings
settingsModal.heading: Manage Group
settingsModal.simplifyDescription: Combine circular debts into the minimum transfers. Example: if A owes B and B owes C, the group can show A paying C directly.

deleteModal.title: Are you sure?
deleteModal.groupDescription: This will permanently delete {groupName}, all its members, and all its expenses. This action cannot be undone.
deleteModal.expenseDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this expense? Math and total balances will be recalculated instantly.

upiSheet.instructions: Copy the UPI ID above → Open your app & pay

paymentConfirm.title: Confirm Settlement
paymentConfirm.heading: Did you pay?
paymentConfirm.cancelMessage: Payment not recorded. You can try again anytime.

empty.title: No transactions this month
empty.description: Tap + to add your first entry for this month.

empty.title: Nothing this month
empty.description: Tap + to add your first income or expense.

deleteModal.title: Delete Transaction
deleteModal.description: Are you sure you want to delete {description}?

soloExpenseModal.title: Individual Payment
soloExpenseModal.subtitle: Record a payment for a friend

errors.userNotFound: User not found by that email. Ask them to join SplitKaro!

errors.browserNotSupported: Voice input requires Chrome or Edge. Please use one of those browsers.
errors.micPermission: Microphone permission denied. Please allow microphone access.
errors.networkError: Speech recognition service is unavailable. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.noSpeech: No speech detected. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Failed to reach the server. Please try again.
errors.partialFail: {count} expense(s) failed to save. Please retry.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.upiError: Invalid format — should look like name@bank
profile.upiDescription: Group members can pay you directly via UPI when settling up.
profile.noGroups: You are not part of any active groups yet.
